failure_summary: The Praxis CLI now fails during import before validate/preview can load the spec because claim lifecycle transition authority initialization hits migration-policy drift.
error_chain: storage.migrations.WorkflowMigrationError: generated workflow migration policy drifted from on-disk numbered SQL files
runtime.domain.RuntimeBoundaryError: claim lifecycle transition authority migration is unavailable

bug_submission.reason: The same CLI import failure prevents the canonical praxis_bugs filing surface from loading, so a real bug row could not be created through the front door in this session.

proposed_bug.title: claim lifecycle migration policy drift blocks workflow validate and preview before spec load
proposed_bug.description: After the probe cleanup landed, both `praxis workflow validate` and `praxis_workflow` preview failed before loading `/Users/nate/Praxis/artifacts/workflow_eval/probe_exec_20260416/runtime_regression_probe.queue.json`. The CLI import path dies while initializing `claim_state_machine` because `workflow_migrations_root()` reports `generated workflow migration policy drifted from on-disk numbered SQL files`, which is then raised as `RuntimeBoundaryError: claim lifecycle transition authority migration is unavailable`. Impact: the canonical read-side validation and preview front doors are blocked for all workflow specs until migration-policy authority is repaired.
